hook.name: Uniderp Hook (Unichain)
hook.description: A fee-collection and referral hook for Uniderp token launches on Unichain that takes a 1% fee on swaps and distributes it among token creators, multi-level referrers (up to 3 tiers), and the platform via afterSwapReturnsDelta. It also records referral relationships during swaps and liquidity additions when a referrer address is provided in hookData.
